changelog:
9router config import/export + multi-provider fixes + 1M context window restore + dark/light selection fix.

=== Context window (proxy/kiro.go) ===

- Restored the version-parse FALLBACK in getContextWindowSize: Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku >= 4.6 (and any major >= 5) advertise the 1M-token window again when Kiro reports no tokenLimits. A26 had collapsed this to a flat 200K, which made Claude Code's context gauge sail past 100% while auto-compaction never fired on 1M models (e.g. claude-opus-4-8). Priority is unchanged: Kiro tokenLimits first, then version parse, then 200K.

=== 9router interop (proxy/import_9router.go) ===

- Import a 9router logical backup (the GET /api/settings/database envelope): providerConnections -> accounts, providerNodes -> custom ProviderConfigs, apiKeys -> inbound client keys. Covers kiro/codex/qoder/custom + built-in api-key providers. The shared /admin/api/import auto-detects the envelope; /admin/api/import/9router is the explicit route.
- Export the current config as a 9router-compatible backup (/admin/api/export/9router), reversing each mapping and emitting a providerNode per custom backend. Dashboard gains 'Import 9router Backup' + 'Export as 9router' buttons.
- config.AddRawAPIKey persists an inbound key verbatim (deduped on value).

=== Provider fixes (proxy/handler.go, proxy/provider_admin.go) ===

- Test button now works for non-Kiro accounts: apiTestAccount was hardcoded to build a Kiro payload with no NormalizedRequest, so Qoder/Codex/custom providers received an empty request + an invalid default model. It is now backend-aware (per-backend default model, real OpenAIRequest stashed via withNormalizedRequest).
- Codex/Qoder accounts seed their model list on add (seedProviderModelList) so the dashboard shows the real count instead of 0.
- Custom providers accept an optional static Models list (used when the endpoint has no /models), and the add path falls back to it. The dashboard badge now reads 'any model' (routes anything) instead of a scary 'no models'.

=== More providers (proxy/provider_catalog.go) ===

- Added 25 built-in providers from 9router's catalog: codebuddy, qwen, glm-cn, kimi, minimax(-cn), cline, kilocode, iflow, longcat, alicode(-intl), gitlab, agentrouter, novita, baseten, scaleway, nscale, modal, ai21, inference-net, kluster, morph, xiaomi-mimo. Guarded by a dedup test so no id/alias collision can ship.

=== Dark/light theme (web/index.html) ===

- Fixed invisible selected text: ::selection set only background (a soft tint), leaving selected text in its own color so muted/colored text vanished. Now forces a saturated accent background + explicit on-accent text color (with -moz-selection), readable in both themes.

=== Tests ===

- import_9router_test.go (slug mapping, multi-provider import, dedupe idempotency, export round-trip, auto-routing, expiry parsing), provider_catalog_dedup_test.go (no duplicate id/alias, newly-added providers resolve), updated context-window + models-response tests for the restored 1M fallback.
